source: Plan 14-06 hand-calc; King County WA condo @ $475,000 with $9,500/mo household at 5% DP → Conv30 eligible at 95% LTV with PMI, Conv15 blocked by DTI, FHA30 blocked by LTV ceiling; verdict cascade Level 3 STRESS-INCOME-SHOCK
notes: Cascade level 3 (WATCH STRESS-INCOME-SHOCK) per lib.property_verdict.synthesize: at preferred 5% DP only Conv30 is eligible (Conv15 fails DTI-CAP-CONVENTIONAL because 5.8%/15yr P&I + $450 HOA pushes piti+obligations/income > 0.50; FHA30 fails LTV-CEILING-FHA because UFMIP-financed LTV = 0.966625 exceeds the conforming FHA-floor LTV ceiling). The single eligible cell (Conv30 @ 5%) then fails the -30% income shock: stressed DTI = (4075.91 + 300) / (9500 × 0.70) = 0.658032 > Conv30 ceiling 0.50 → VERDICT_WATCH_STRESS_INCOME_FAIL fires before any GO-default branch can reach. Hand-calc anchors via lib.amortize.build_schedule: Conv30 @ 6.5%/30yr on $451,250 principal (95% LTV financed) → monthly_pi=$2852.21; Conv15 @ 5.8%/15yr on $451,250 → monthly_pi=$3759.32; FHA30 @ 6.5%/30yr on financed principal (base $451,250 + UFMIP 1.75% = $459,146.88 — see engine output below) → monthly_pi=$2902.12 + monthly_mi=$191.31. PMI applies on Conv: monthly_mi = 451250 × 0.0075/12 = $282.03 (PMI-RATE-ESTIMATED-0.0075 per Pitfall 1). PITI Conv30 = 2852.21 + 416.67 + 75.00 + 450.00 + 282.03 = $4075.91 (per Pitfall 6 quantize-once). Hand-calc cascade trace: Level 1 fail (>=1 cell eligible somewhere); Level 2 fail (eligible-at-preferred=[Conv30] non-empty); Level 3 hit: Conv30 income-shock breach (stressed DTI 0.658032 > ceiling 0.50). Verdict pinned to WATCH.

_meta.citation: ANLZ-01 + ANLZ-02 + ANLZ-03 + VERD-01: covers HOA-into-PITI threading (ANLZ-02 numeric population), PMI-RATE-ESTIMATED soft signal surfacing at LTV>0.80 (ANLZ-03 eligible_reasons), and VERDICT_WATCH_STRESS_INCOME_FAIL cascade Level 3 branch (VERD-01 D-14-VERDICT-02 falsifiable income-shock predicate).

verdict.headline_reason: Income-shock stress breaches DTI ceiling for 1 eligible program(s)
